title: astro check in web CI — load the App.Locals augmentation, clean .astro type errors, gate typecheck

tasks.title: Add env.d.ts to tsconfig.files so the App.Locals augmentation loads
tasks.description: Add "files": ["src/env.d.ts"] to apps/web/tsconfig.json (additive to include). Verify: `tsc --noEmit --listFilesOnly` lists apps/web/src/env.d.ts AND `astro check` drops from 185 to ~68 errors with 0 'does not exist on type Locals' errors. Record before/after in progress.md. No source changes. Test: the verification IS the test (astro check count); the durable guard is T-002.

subtasks.title: Verify env.d.ts in program via tsc --listFilesOnly

tasks.title: Add compile-time App.Locals regression guard
tasks.description: Add a typecheck-time assertion in apps/web that fails to compile if the App.Locals augmentation is not loaded (e.g. a .ts file with `const _guard: App.Locals = { locale: 'es', user: null, cspNonce: '' } satisfies App.Locals` plus reads of locale/user/cspNonce, or an expectTypeOf assertion). Must run under the existing typecheck. Prevents a dropped tsconfig.files entry from silently re-breaking the 117. Test: removing files[] makes this file fail typecheck (verify once, manually).

subtasks.title: Confirm it fails when augmentation not loaded

tasks.title: Fix ts(7006) implicit-any parameters in .astro (6)
tasks.description: Add explicit parameter types to the 6 implicit-any params astro check reports (ts7006). Mechanical: derive the type from usage / the array element type; no `any`. Re-run astro check and confirm the ts7006 bucket is 0. Files per baseline bucketing.

subtasks.title: Type each of the 6 implicit-any params

tasks.title: Fix ts(2724) wrong imports + ts(2353) interface gaps (incl BreadcrumbItem.href)
tasks.description: Fix the 2 ts2724 'no exported member' (correct the import name) and 2 ts2353 object-literal/interface gaps. For BreadcrumbItem.href, extend the canonical type definition (component type / @repo/schemas), NOT the call site. Re-run astro check; confirm both buckets -> 0.

tasks.title: Fix ts(2322) type-assignment mismatches in .astro (22)
tasks.description: Fix the 22 ts2322 type-assignment errors. For each, determine whether the assigned value is genuinely the wrong shape (real bug -> fix logic + add/adjust test) or a missing/incorrect annotation (fix the type). No `any`, no suppression. Re-run astro check; confirm ts2322 bucket -> 0. Group by file/directory; AccountLayout/Footer/BaseLayout are dense.

subtasks.title: Triage each ts2322: real bug vs annotation
Fix types / logic (+ tests for real bugs)

tasks.title: Fix ts(2339) non-Locals property-not-exist (21) + ts(2345) argument-type (9)
tasks.description: The dangerous bucket — these are the W6/W8 class (wrong response shape consumed in .astro frontmatter). For each: verify the runtime shape; if the read is genuinely wrong, FIX THE LOGIC and add a regression test; if the type just needs the right interface, apply it. No `any`/suppression. Re-run astro check; confirm ts2339 + ts2345 buckets -> 0.

subtasks.title: Triage each ts2339/ts2345: real bug vs type
Fix logic + add regression tests for real bugs

tasks.title: Fix ts(2352) conversions (5) + ts(2358) instanceof LHS (1)
tasks.description: Fix the tail: 5 ts2352 unsafe conversions (correct the source/target type rather than double-casting through unknown unless genuinely warranted with a comment) and 1 ts2358 instanceof LHS. Re-run astro check; confirm both buckets -> 0.

tasks.title: Verify astro check exits 0 errors on the full tree
tasks.description: Run `pnpm --dir apps/web exec astro check`. Confirm 0 errors (63 hints allowed). If any new errors appeared from a rebase, fix before proceeding. This gates Phase 3 wiring.

tasks.title: Wire astro check into the web typecheck script + confirm CI
tasks.description: Update apps/web/package.json `typecheck` to `astro sync && astro check && tsc --noEmit --project ./tsconfig.json`. Confirm the monorepo turbo `typecheck` pipeline runs the web typecheck script unchanged (it calls the package script by name). Document that astro check fails on errors only (hints don't). Only after T-008 is green.

subtasks.title: Confirm CI typecheck job picks it up

tasks.title: Document .astro typechecking + env.d.ts files invariant
tasks.description: Short note in apps/web/CLAUDE.md (or web docs): .astro is now typechecked in CI via astro check (catches the W6/W8 wrong-shape class), and apps/web/src/env.d.ts MUST stay in tsconfig.json `files` or the App.Locals augmentation silently stops loading. Reference the regression guard.
